problem id: d6e5cd59
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00001000 -> 11101111
  10110100 -> 10010111
  00011111 -> 00000001
  11100001 -> 01111101
  00100111 -> 01110001
  10110011 -> 01011001
  00110001 -> 11011101
  11000010 -> 11111011
  01110001 -> 01011101

query: 01001000
predicted answer: 01101111
